content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.56%, Bank Nifty -0.72%, India VIX +2.4% to 17.02 — risk-off undertone with broad weakness despite IT outperformance (+0.62%). However, my book is heavily exposed to winners (HAL +5%, COFORGE +5.4%, PNBHOUSING +8.6%) that are extending on Q4 results. Priority is to lock gains via SL trailing while letting structurally strong names run. New entries should be selective given soft index tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1051.64,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Holding CMP 1072.80, +8.6%. SL 1051.64 already at +6.9% locked-in gain (well above breakeven). Trail-gap from CMP is ~2% — within Rule (c) 1% floor, healthy room. Doji + bearish engulfing in last two sessions suggest consolidation post the 30% one-month rally; do not chase tighter. Keeping SL/target as-is — no-op MODIFY avoided by leaving same values, but emitting HOLD instead per Rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior — emit HOLD. SL 1051.64 sits ~2% below CMP 1072.80 with locked +6.9% gain. Healthy trail-gap, consolidation candles support patience. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HAL +5.1% at 4812 with Q4 board meeting May 14 (4 trading sessions away — outside the 3-session binary window today, but tight). Current SL 4725.56 = +3.3% locked, ~1.8% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. Stock printed +4.4% today on JM Financial Buy + ICICI top defense pick. Will re-evaluate SL closer to May 14. Keeping current levels — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior MODIFY no-op. SL 4725.56 (+3.3% lock, 1.8% trail-gap from CMP 4812) is appropriate. Q4 board meeting May 14 is 4 sessions away — outside Rule 11's 3-session binary window today. Will trim/tighten on May 12-13 ticks per Rule 11 disposition (b)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8% at 7014.50; current SL 6960 sits 0.78% below CMP — VIOLATES the 1% trail-gap floor (Rule 14c). Need to LOOSEN, but rule says SL can only be tightened. Therefore emit HOLD instead and accept current SL — but warn: a normal intraday downtick will trip this. Given SRF +10.9% sector confirmation and Chemours catalyst Jun/Jul, the SL is too tight for the thesis. Cannot loosen — system rejects. Emitting HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 is 0.78% below CMP 7014.50 — tighter than the 1% trail-gap floor would prefer, but cannot loosen per system rules. Accept that a normal downtick may stop us out. Sector momentum (SRF +10.9%, Chemours commissioning Jun/Jul) supports the thesis. If stopped, the thesis is intact for re-entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.1% at 837.45; SL 836 sits ~0.2% below CMP — extremely tight (sub-1% trail-gap), but cannot loosen. Promoter warrant subscription at 945-947 = strong insider conviction. Q4 results expected May; let the SL handle it. If stopped on noise, the thesis is intact for re-entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slight loss -1.1% at 365; SL 365 = entry-near level. Q4 PAT +30% YoY beat, lending crossed Rs 2 lakh cr — fundamentals strong. SL fine where it is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1% at 829; Q4 revenue +22% YoY led FMCG peers (HUL +6%, Dabur mid-single). SL 815 is ~1.7% below CMP — within healthy trail-gap. Hold for target 860."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1300.36,
      "new_target": 1380.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.4% at 1326.50; original target 1330 essentially HIT. Q4 PAT 612 vs 261 YoY (multifold), revenue +29%, PL Capital TP 2020. Raising target to 1380 to extend the run on confirmed Q4 beat + Encora/Cigniti integration narrative. SL 1300.36 = ~2% below CMP, healthy trail-gap. Tightening target only is technically loosening it, but raising target from 1330 to 1380 is allowed (target is not SL). New R:R from current: ~2.0x risk vs reward to new target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% at 3060; FY26 PAT +41.8%, Rs 33,000 cr corvette order in Q1FY27 pipeline. SL at entry 3025 = breakeven — acceptable. Defense sector +tailwind continues. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.1% at 830.70; SL 806 at entry. Q4 record revenue beat, Citi Sell offset by another analyst's 3900 breakout view. SL ~3% below CMP — fine. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% at 124.45; macro hedge with West Asia tensions + INR weakness backdrop. SL 121 = ~2.8% below CMP. Hold for target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Top gainer +9.45% to 9125 after Q4 beat; Citi TP raised to 10,500. Tempting BULLISH (+0.10) but stock just ran 6%+ intraday and is at all-time highs — chasing post-gap is the failure mode. Better entry on consolidation. Watchlist for a 2-3 day pullback toward 8700-8800."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "FINCABLES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 10 — exactly 2 sessions away — BINARY EVENT within Rule 11's 3-session window. NEUTRAL research (-0.05 modifier). NO new entry into binary event with sub-0.65 confidence."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 33,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1490.00,
      "stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "target": 1575.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 announced YESTERDAY (May 7) — binary event already passed. PAT +36.6% YoY beat, UVG 15.3% best-in-class FMCG, EBITDA margin +280bps. Stock gapped +9.68% to 1496 confirming the beat. Entry at 1490 limit (just below CMP 1496.30 = price-maker per Rule 9). SL 1445 = -3.0% from entry; Target 1575 = +5.7% (just below 52w high 1574.95). R:R = 45/85 = 1.89x — clears 1.5 floor. Position size: 33 × 1490 = ₹49,170 (~4.9% of capital). Risk = 4.9% × 3.0% = 0.147% of portfolio — well within 0.5% per-name budget. Chemicals sector cluster check: NAVINFLUOR (Specialty Chem) held; PIDILITIND is adhesives/consumer-bridge — different sub-cluster, OK. BFSI cluster unaffected."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "BULLISH +0.08, +5.9% on 11.8x volume. Q4 FY26 results PENDING (date TBD) — earnings event risk per Rule 11. Zaynich USFDA decision is open-ended catalyst. Do not enter into pending Q4 binary."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "BULLISH +0.10, +10.92% post-Q4. Already exposed to Specialty Chemicals via NAVINFLUOR — adding SRF would create cluster concentration in fluorochemicals/specialty chem with two names moving on same macro driver (Rule 10). Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pharma momentum but no full deep data provided this cycle for risk-budget validation. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATATECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "12.8x volume divergence with weak +1.55% price suggests distribution as much as accumulation — ambiguous signal. No deep data. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NUVAMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+17.98% top gainer is a chasable post-gap setup — high asymmetric downside if it sells the news. Pass without consolidation."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN MIS BUY @ 133.50 from 3173 minutes ago (>2 days old). MIS orders cannot carry across sessions; this is dead/orphaned. Cancel to clean the order book."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+8.6%, SL 1051.64 locks +6.9%. Healthy 2% trail-gap from CMP 1072.80. Doji/bearish engulfing argue for consolidation; not tightening further to avoid forced exit on noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge. SL 121 = 2.8% below CMP — appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+5.1%, SL 4725.56 = +3.3% locked, 1.8% trail-gap from CMP 4812 — healthy. Q4 results May 14 in 4 sessions; will re-evaluate next 1-2 ticks per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 sits 0.78% below CMP — tighter than ideal, but cannot be loosened by rule. Accept noise stopout risk; thesis intact for re-entry if hit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 836 = 0.2% below CMP — extremely tight from entry placement, but unable to loosen. Promoter warrant signal supports thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30%, lending Rs 2 lakh cr. SL 365 will absorb noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, sector-leading Q4 revenue growth. SL 815 = 1.7% below CMP, healthy."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Target raised to 1380 in decisions section to ride the multifold Q4 beat. SL 1300.36 maintained at +3.3% locked-in."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, defense capex pipeline strong. SL at breakeven 3025."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+3.1%, Q4 record revenue. SL 806 at entry — fine for early position."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "POLYCAB at 9125 — wait for pullback toward 8700-8800 for cleaner entry; FINCABLES — re-assess post-May-10 Q4; WOCKPHARMA — re-assess post Q4 print; SRF — skipped on cluster overlap with NAVINFLUOR; NUVAMA / TATATECH — sit out post-gap chase. PIDILITIND BUY admitted today as the day's qualifying setup (Q4 binary already cleared, beat confirmed, pre-FMCG-cohort price action constructive).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment now ~54% post-PIDILITIND (+~5%). Adding one quality post-Q4-beat name into a soft-tape day is consistent with Rule 18 admit discipline — would not skip a clearly qualifying setup just because index is down. Multiple holdings (NAVINFLUOR, TITAGARH, GRSE, CAMS, ABCAPITAL) carry SLs within 1-3% of entry — needed since they're Day-0 holds, but means a single broad market downtick could chain stopouts. Watching Bank Nifty 55500 — break below would warrant defensive trim of ABCAPITAL and tightening on PNBHOUSING. HAL Q4 board meeting on May 14 — will choose Rule 11 disposition (likely partial trim or SL tightening to ~4750) on May 12-13 ticks."
}
